mapper.sql: oi.id, oi.order_no, oi.goods_id, oi.goods_name, oi.goods_pic, oi.goods_price, oi.goods_num, oi.total_amount, oi.order_status, oi.pay_type, oi.refund_status, oi.refund_amount, oi.create_time, oi.update_time, u1.nickname as buyerNickname, u2.nickname as sellerNickname
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_no as orderNo, buyer_id as buyerId, seller_id as sellerId, goods_id as goodsId, goods_name as goodsName, goods_pic as goodsPic, goods_price as goodsPrice, goods_num as goodsNum, total_amount as totalAmount, order_status as orderStatus, pay_type as payType, pay_time as payTime, delivery_time as deliveryTime, receive_time as receiveTime, cancel_time as cancelTime, remark, refund_status as refundStatus, -- 退款状态 refund_amount as refundAmount, -- 退款金额 refund_reason as refundReason, -- 退款原因 refund_time as refundTime, -- 退款时间 refund_remark as refundRemark, -- 退款备注 create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM order_info WHERE id = #{id}
